info.name: text-delete
info.text: Our thoughts have to be tended to daily to ensure they blossom into amazing concepts.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Abandoning a good belief will cause it to wither on the vine and become useless and outdated.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Sometimes our thoughts, if let run rampant, can become an entangled mess that will take a long time to fix.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Unchecked negative thoughts can quickly become an entangled mess that will destroy our hard work.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Positive thoughts are mental seeds that, when inserted in someone else's mind, can grow into something truly beautiful.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: The mind of a genius is a garden that can nourish all of humanity if it's treated carefully.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Some concepts bear fruit, while others wither and die before they can.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Good concepts cannot stand on their own - they need constant attention and resources to ensure they are the best they can be.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Left unchecked, an innocent thought could easily grow out of hand and become more harm than its worth.
